#include \"envoy/network/filter.h\"\n12: #include \"envoy/network/listener.h\"\n13: #include \"envoy/server/drain_manager.h\"\n14: #include \"envoy/server/filter_config.h\"\n15: #include \"envoy/server/instance.h\"\n16: #include \"envoy/server/listener_manager.h\"\n17: #include \"envoy/stats/scope.h\"\n18: \n19: #include \"source/common/common/basic_resource_impl.h\"\n20: #include \"source/common/common/logger.h\"\n21: #include \"source/common/init/manager_impl.h\"\n22: #include \"source/common/init/target_impl.h\"\n23: #include \"source/common/listener_manager/filter_chain_manager_impl.h\"\n24: #include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_info_impl.h\"\n25: #include \"source/common/quic/quic_stat_names.h\"\n26: #include \"source/server/factory_context_impl.h\"\n27: #include \"source/server/transport_socket_config_impl.h\"\n28: \n29: namespace Envoy {\n30: namespace Server {\n31: \n32: /**\n33:  * All missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n34:  */\n35: #define ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(COUNTER)                                                 \\\n36:   COUNTER(extension_config_missing)                                                                \\\n37:   COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n38: \n39: /**\n40:  * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n41:  */\n42: struct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n43:   ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n44: };\n45: \n46: class ListenerMessageUtil {\n47: public:\n48:   /**\n49:    * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n50:    */\n51:   static bool socketOptionsEqual(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n52:                                  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n53: \n54:   /**\n55:    * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs are the same if ignoring filter_chains field.\n56:    */\n57:   static bool filterChainOnlyChange(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n58:                                     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n59: };\n60: \n61: class ListenerManagerImpl;\n62: \n63: class ListenSocketFactoryImpl : public Network::ListenSocketFactory,\n64:                                 protected Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\n65: public:\n66:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\n67:   create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n68:          Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n69:          const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n70:          ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n71:          const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\n72: \n73:   // Network::ListenSocketFactory\n74:   Network::Socket::Type socketType() const override { return socket_type_; }\n75:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& localAddress() const override {\n76:     return local_address_;\n77:   }\n78:   Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\n79:   Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\n80:     return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\n81:   }\n82:   void closeAllSockets() override {\n83:     for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\n84:       socket->close();\n85:     }\n86:   }\n87:   absl::Status doFinalPreWorkerInit() override;\n88: \n89: private:\n90:   ListenSocketFactoryImpl(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n91:                           Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n92:                           Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\n93:                           const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n94:                           const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n95:                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n96:                           const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options,\n97:                           uint32_t num_sockets, absl::Status& creation_status);\n98: \n99:   ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\n100: \n101:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\n102:   createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n103:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\n104: \n105:   ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\n106:   // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\n107:   // will be set to the binding port.\n108:   Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n109:   const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n110:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\n111:   const std::string listener_name_;\n112:   const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n113:   ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\n114:   const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\n115:   // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\n116:   // 3 different cases:\n117:   // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\n118:   // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\n119:   // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\n120:   //\n121:   // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\n122:   // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\n123:   std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\n124: };\n125: \n126: // TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\n127: //                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\n128: \n129: class ListenerImpl;\n130: \n131: /**\n132:  * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\n133:  * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\n134:  */\n135: class ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\n136:                                              public Network::DrainDecision {\n137: public:\n138:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n139:                                  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n140:                                  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n141:                                  Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n142: \n143:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n144:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n145: \n146:   // DrainDecision\n147:   bool drainClose() const override {\n148:     return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\n149:   }\n150:   Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\n151:   friend class ListenerImpl;\n152: \n153: private:\n154:   const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\n155: };\n156: \n157: // TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\n158: // ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\n159: // listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\n160: class PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\n161: public:\n162:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n163:                                 ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n164:                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n165:                                 ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n166: \n167:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n168:       std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n169:       ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n170:       : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n171:         listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n172: \n173:   // FactoryContext\n174:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n175:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n176:   Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n177:   const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n178:   ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n179:   Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n180:   Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n181: \n182:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n183: \n184:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n185:   friend class ListenerImpl;\n186: \n187: private:\n188:   std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n189:   ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n190: };\n191: \n192: /**\n193:  * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n194:  */\n195: class ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n196:                            public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n197:                            Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\n198: public:\n199:   /**\n200:    * Create a new listener.\n201:    * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n202:    * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n203:    * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n204:    * @param name supplies the listener name.\n205:    * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n206:    * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n207:    *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n208:    * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n209:    * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n210:    */\n211:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n212:   create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n213:          ListenerManagerImpl& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n214:          bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n215:   ~ListenerImpl() override;\n216: \n217:   // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n218:   // update.\n219:   /**\n220:    * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n221:    * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n222:    */\n223:   absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n224:   newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n225:                              bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n226:   /**\n227:    * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n228:    */\n229:   bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n230:                                 bool worker_started);\n231: \n232:   /**\n233:    * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n234:    * listener config.\n235:    */\n236:   void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n237:                        std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n238: \n239:   /**\n240:    * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n241:    */\n242:   bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n243:   bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n244: \n245:   const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n246:     return addresses_;\n247:   }\n248:   const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n249:   const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n250:     return socket_factories_;\n251:   }\n252:   void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n253:   void initialize();\n254:   DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n255:     return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n256:   }\n257:   absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n258:   void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n259:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n260:     ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n261:     return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n262:   }\n263:   const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n264:   bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n265:   static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n266:                                     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n267:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n268: \n269:   // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n270:   bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n271:   // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n272:   bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n273:   // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n274:   bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n275: \n276:   // Network::ListenerConfig\n277:   Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n278:   Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n279:   std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n280:     return socket_factories_;\n281:   }\n282:   bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n283:   bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n284:   bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n285:     return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n286:   }\n287:   uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n288:     return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n289:   }\n290:   std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n291:     return listener_filters_timeout_;\n292:   }\n293:   bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n294:     return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n295:   }\n296:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n297:   uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n298:   const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n299:   Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n300:     return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n301:                                            : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n302:   }\n303:   Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n304:     return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n305:                                                 : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n306:   }\n307:   Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n308:   connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n309:     auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n310:     ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n311:     return *balancer->second;\n312:   }\n313:   ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n314:   const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n315:   uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n316:   uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n317:     return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n318:   }\n319:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n320:   bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n321:   bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n322:   const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n323:     ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n324:     return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n325:   }\n326: \n327:   void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n328:     if (options == nullptr) {\n329:       options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n330:     }\n331:   }\n332: \n333:   absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n334:   void closeAllSockets();\n335: \n336:   Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n337: \n338:   // Network::FilterChainFactory\n339:   bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n340:                                 const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n341:   bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n342:   void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n343:                                     Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n344:   bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n345: \n346:   SystemTime last_updated_;\n347: \n348: private:\n349:   ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n350:                ListenerManagerImpl& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n351:                bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n352:   struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n353:     UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n354:         : config_(config) {}\n355: \n356:     // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n357:     Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n358:     Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n359:     Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n360:     listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n361:       auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n362:       ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n363:       return *iter->second;\n364:     }\n365:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n366: \n367:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n368:     Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n369:     Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n370:     absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n371:   };\n372: \n373:   class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n374:   public:\n375:     InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n376:         : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n377: \n378:     Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n379:       return internal_listener_registry_;\n380:     }\n381: \n382:   private:\n383:     Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n384:   };\n385: \n386:   /**\n387:    * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n388:    * filter chain update is decided. Should be called only by newListenerWithFilterChain().\n389:    */\n390:   ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin, const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n391:                const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\n392:                const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started, uint64_t hash,\n393:                absl::Status& creation_status);\n394:   // Helpers for constructor.\n395:   void buildAccessLog(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n396:   absl::Status buildInternalListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n397:   absl::Status validateConfig();\n398:   bool buildUdpListenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address,\n399:                                     uint32_t concurrency);\n400:   absl::Status buildUdpListenerFactory(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n401:                                        uint32_t concurrency);\n402:   void buildListenSocketOptions(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n403:                                 std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<\n404:                                     envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>& address_opts_list);\n405:   absl::Status createListenerFilterFactories(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n406:   absl::Status validateFilterChains(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n407:   absl::Status buildFilterChains(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n408:   absl::Status buildConnectionBalancer(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n409:                                        const Network::Address::Instance& address);\n410:   void buildSocketOptions(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n411:   void buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address,\n414:                                       const envoy::config::core::v3::Address& proto_address);\n415: \n416:   void addListenSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n417:                               const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& append_options) {\n418:     ensureSocketOptions(options);\n419:     Network::Socket::appendOptions(options, append_options);\n420:   }\n421: \n422:   ListenerManagerImpl& parent_;\n423:   const bool bind_to_port_;\n428:   const bool mptcp_enabled_;\n429:   const bool hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n430:   const uint32_t per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n431:   const uint64_t listener_tag_;\n432:   const std::string name_;\n433:   const bool added_via_api_;\n434:   const bool workers_started_;\n435:   const uint64_t hash_;\n436:   const uint32_t ignore_global_conn_limit_;\n440:   const bool bypass_overload_manager_;\n441: \n442:   // A target is added to Server's InitManager if workers_started_ is false.\n443:   Init::TargetImpl listener_init_target_;\n444:   // This init manager is populated with targets from the filter chain factories, namely\n445:   // RdsRouteConfigSubscription::init_target_, so the listener can wait for route configs.\n446:   std::unique_ptr<Init::Manager> dynamic_init_manager_;\n447: \n448:   Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList listener_filter_factories_;\n449:   std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb> udp_listener_filter_factories_;\n450:   Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList quic_listener_filter_factories_;\n451: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::create(\\n76:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\\n77:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\\n78:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\\n79:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\\n80:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets) {\\n81:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\\n82:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(\\n83:       factory, address, socket_type, options, listener_name, tcp_backlog_size, bind_type,\\n84:       creation_options, num_sockets, creation_status));\\n85:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\\n86:   return ret;\\n87: }\\n88: \\n89: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(\\n90:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\\n91:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\\n92:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\\n93:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\\n94:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets,\\n95:     absl::Status& creation_status)\\n96:     : factory_(factory), local_address_(address), socket_type_(socket_type), options_(options),\\n97:       listener_name_(listener_name), tcp_backlog_size_(tcp_backlog_size), bind_type_(bind_type),\\n98:       socket_creation_options_(creation_options) {\\n99: \\n100:   if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip) {\\n101:     if (socket_type == Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\\n103:     }\\n104:   } else {\\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\\n111:       }\\n112:     } else {\\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\\n115:     }\\n116:   }\\n117: \\n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n121: \\n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() && local_address_->ip()->port() == 0) {\\n123:     local_address_ = sockets_[0]->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress();\\n124:   }\\n125:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Set listener {} socket factory local address to {}\\\", listener_name,\\n126:             local_address_->asString());\\n127: \\n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\\n132:     } else {\\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n136:     }\\n137:   }\\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\\n139: }\\n140: \\n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\\n155:     //\\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\\n162:   }\\n163: }\\n164: \\n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\\n174: \\n175:   // Binding is done by now.\\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\\\", listener_name_,\\n177:             local_address_->asString());\\n178:   if (socket != nullptr && options_ != nullptr) {\\n179:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\\n180:         options_, *socket, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_BOUND);\\n181:     const std::string message =\\n182:         fmt::format(\\\"{}: Setting socket options {}\\\", listener_name_, ok ? \\\"succeeded\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n183:     if (!ok) {\\n184:       ENVOY_LOG(warn, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n185:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n186:     } else {\\n187:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n188:     }\\n189: \\n190:     // Add the options to the socket_ so that STATE_LISTENING options can be\\n191:     // set after listen() is called and immediately before the workers start running.\\n192:     socket->addOptions(options_);\\n193:   }\\n194:   return socket;\\n195: }\\n196: \\n197: Network::SocketSharedPtr ListenSocketFactoryImpl::getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) {\\n198:   // Per the TODO above, sockets at this point can never be null. That only happens in the\\n199:   // config validation path.\\n200:   ASSERT(worker_index < sockets_.size() && sockets_[worker_index] != nullptr);\\n201:   return sockets_[worker_index];\\n202: }\\n203: \\n204: absl::Status ListenSocketFactoryImpl::doFinalPreWorkerInit() {\\n205:   if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind ||\\n206:       socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n207:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n208:   }\\n209: \\n210:   ASSERT(!sockets_.empty());\\n211:   auto listen_and_apply_options = [](Envoy::Network::SocketSharedPtr socket, int tcp_backlog_size) {\\n212:     const auto rc = socket->ioHandle().listen(tcp_backlog_size);\\n213:     if (rc.return_value_ != 0) {\\n214:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\\"cannot listen() errno={}\\\", rc.errno_));\\n215:     }\\n216:     if (!Network::Socket::applyOptions(socket->options(), *socket,\\n217:                                        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_LISTENING)) {\\n218:       std::string message =\\n219:           fmt::format(\\\"cannot set post-listen socket option on socket: {}\\\",\\n220:                       socket->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress()->asString());\\n221:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n222:     }\\n223:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n224:   };\\n225:   // On all platforms we should listen on the first socket.\\n226:   auto iterator = sockets_.begin();\\n227:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n228:   ++iterator;\\n229: #ifndef WIN32\\n230:   // With this implementation on Windows we only accept\\n231:   // connections on Worker 1 and then we use the `ExactConnectionBalancer`\\n232:   // to balance these connections to all workers.\\n233:   // TODO(davinci26): We should update the behavior when socket duplication\\n234:   // does not cause accepts to hang in the OS.\\n235:   for (; iterator != sockets_.end(); ++iterator) {\\n236:     RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n237:   }\\n238: #endif\\n239:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n240: }\\n241: \\n242: namespace {\\n243: std::string listenerStatsScope(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n244:   if (!config.stat_prefix().empty()) {\\n245:     return config.stat_prefix();\\n246:   }\\n247:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n248:     return absl::StrCat(\\\"envoy_internal_\\\", config.name());\\n249:   }\\n250:   auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n251:   if (address_or_error.status().ok()) {\\n252:     return address_or_error.value()->asString();\\n253:   }\\n254:   // Listener creation will fail shortly when the address is used.\\n255:   return absl::StrCat(\\\"invalid_address_listener\\\");\\n256: }\\n257: } // namespace\\n258: \\n259: ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(\\n260:     Envoy::Server::Instance& server, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\\n261:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager)\\n262:     : Server::FactoryContextImplBase(\\n263:           server, validation_visitor, server.stats().createScope(\\\"\\\"),\\n264:           server.stats().createScope(fmt::format(\\\"listener.{}.\\\", listenerStatsScope(config))),\\n265:           std::make_shared<ListenerInfoImpl>(config)),\\n266:       drain_manager_(std::move(drain_manager)) {}\\n267: \\n268: Network::DrainDecision& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainDecision() { return *this; }\\n269: Server::DrainManager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainManager() { return *drain_manager_; }\\n270: Init::Manager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::initManager() { return server_.initManager(); }\\n271: \\n272: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\\n273: ListenerImpl::create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n274:                      const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n275:                      const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n276:                      uint64_t hash) {\\n277:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\\n278:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>(new ListenerImpl(\\n279:       config, version_info, parent, name, added_via_api, workers_started, hash, creation_status));\\n280:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\\n281:   return ret;\\n282: }\\n283: \\n284: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n285:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n286:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n287:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n288:     : parent_(parent),\\n289:       socket_type_(config.has_internal_listener()\\n290:                        ?    const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>\\n345:       address_opts_list;\\n346:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n347:     addresses_.emplace_back(\\n348:         std::make_shared<Network::Address::EnvoyInternalInstance>(config.name()));\\n349:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n350:   } else {\\n351:     // All the addresses should be same socket type, so get the first address's socket type is\\n352:     // enough.\\n353:     auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n354:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(address_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n355:     auto address = std::move(address_or_error.value());\\n356:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.address()), creation_status);\\n357:     addresses_.emplace_back(address);\\n358:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n359: \\n360:     for (auto i = 0; i < config.additional_addresses_size(); i++) {\\n361:       if (socket_type_ !=\\n362:           Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.additional_addresses(i).address())) {\\n363:         creation_status = absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n364:             fmt::format(\\\"listener {}: has different socket type. The listener only \\\"\\n365:                         \\\"support same socket type for all the addresses.\\\",\\n366:                         name_));\\n367:         return;\\n368:       }\\n369:       auto addresses_or_error =\\n370:           Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.additional_addresses(i).address());\\n371:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(addresses_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n372:       auto additional_address = std::move(addresses_or_error.value());\\n373:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(\\n374:           checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.additional_addresses(i).address()),\\n375:           creation_status);\\n376:       addresses_.emplace_back(additional_address);\\n377:       if (config.additional_addresses(i).has_socket_options()) {\\n378:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(\\n379:             std::ref(config.additional_addresses(i).socket_options().socket_options()));\\n380:       } else {\\n381:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n382:       }\\n383:     }\\n384:   }\\n385: \\n386:   const absl::optional<std::string> runtime_val =\\n387:       listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime().snapshot().get(\\n388:           cx_limit_runtime_key_);\\n389:   if (runtime_val && runtime_val->empty()) {\\n390:     ENVOY_LOG(warn,\\n391:               \\\"Listener connection limit runtime key {} is empty. There are currently no \\\"\\n392:               \\\"limitations on the number of accepted connections for listener {}.\\\",\\n393:               cx_limit_runtime_key_, config.name());\\n394:   }\\n395: \\n396:   filter_chain_manager_ = std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n397:       addresses_, listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager()),\\n398: \\n399:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n400:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n401: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.cc\"}",

#include \"source/common/quic/active_quic_listener.h\"\n39: #include \"source/common/quic/udp_gso_batch_writer.h\"\n40: #endif\n41: \n42: namespace Envoy {\n43: namespace Server {\n44: \n45: namespace {\n46: \n47: bool anyFilterChain(\n48:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n49:     std::function<bool(const envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain&)> predicate) {\n50:   return (config.has_default_filter_chain() && predicate(config.default_filter_chain())) ||\n51:          std::any_of(config.filter_chains().begin(), config.filter_chains().end(), predicate);\n52: }\n53: \n54: bool usesProxyProto(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n55:   // Checking only the first or default filter chain is done for backwards compatibility.\n56:   const bool use_proxy_proto = PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(\n57:       config.filter_chains().empty() ? config.default_filter_chain() : config.filter_chains()[0],\n58:       use_proxy_proto, false);\n59:   if (use_proxy_proto) {\n60:     ENVOY_LOG_MISC(warn,\n61:                    \"using deprecated field 'use_proxy_proto' is dangerous as it does not respect \"\n62:                    \"listener filter order. Do not use this field and instead configure the proxy \"\n63:                    \"proto listener filter directly.\");\n64:   }\n65: \n66:   return use_proxy_proto;\n67: }\n68: \n69: bool shouldBindToPort(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n70:   return PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, bind_to_port, true) &&\n71:          PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config.deprecated_v1(), bind_to_port, true);\n72: }\n73: } // namespace\n74: \n75: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::create(\n76:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n77:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n78:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n79:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n80:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets) {\n81:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\n82:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(\n83:       factory, address, socket_type, options, listener_name, tcp_backlog_size, bind_type,\n84:       creation_options, num_sockets, creation_status));\n85:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\n86:   return ret;\n87: }\n88: \n89: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(\n90:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n91:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n92:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n93:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n94:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets,\n95:     absl::Status& creation_status)\n96:     : factory_(factory), local_address_(address), socket_type_(socket_type), options_(options),\n97:       listener_name_(listener_name), tcp_backlog_size_(tcp_backlog_size), bind_type_(bind_type),\n98:       socket_creation_options_(creation_options) {\n99: \n100:   if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip) {\n101:     if (socket_type == Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\n103:     }\n104:   } else {\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\n111:       }\n112:     } else {\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\n115:     }\n116:   }\n117: \n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\n121: \n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() && local_address_->ip()->port() == 0) {\n123:     local_address_ = sockets_[0]->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress();\n124:   }\n125:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Set listener {} socket factory local address to {}\", listener_name,\n126:             local_address_->asString());\n127: \n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\n132:     } else {\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\n136:     }\n137:   }\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\n139: }\n140: \n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\n155:     //\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\n162:   }\n163: }\n164: \n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\n174: \n175:   // Binding is done by now.\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\", listener_name_,\n177:             local_address_->asString());\n178:   if (socket != nullptr && options_ != nullptr) {\n179:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\n180:         options_, *socket, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_BOUND);\n181:     const std::string message =\n182:         fmt::format(\"{}: Setting socket options {}\", listener_name_, ok ? \"succeeded\" : \"failed\");\n183:     if (!ok) {\n184:       ENVOY_LOG(warn, \"{}\", message);\n185:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\n186:     } else {\n187:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"{}\", message);\n188:     }\n189: \n190:     // Add the options to the socket_ so that STATE_LISTENING options can be\n191:     // set after listen() is called and immediately before the workers start running.\n192:     socket->addOptions(options_);\n193:   }\n194:   return socket;\n195: }\n196: \n197: Network::SocketSharedPtr ListenSocketFactoryImpl::getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) {\n198:   // Per the TODO above, sockets at this point can never be null. That only happens in the\n199:   // config validation path.\n200:   ASSERT(worker_index < sockets_.size() && sockets_[worker_index] != nullptr);\n201:   return sockets_[worker_index];\n202: }\n203: \n204: absl::Status ListenSocketFactoryImpl::doFinalPreWorkerInit() {\n205:   if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind ||\n206:       socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\n207:     return absl::OkStatus();\n208:   }\n209: \n210:   ASSERT(!sockets_.empty());\n211:   auto listen_and_apply_options = [](Envoy::Network::SocketSharedPtr socket, int tcp_backlog_size) {\n212:     const auto rc = socket->ioHandle().listen(tcp_backlog_size);\n213:     if (rc.return_value_ != 0) {\n214:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\"cannot listen() errno={}\", rc.errno_));\n215:     }\n216:     if (!Network::Socket::applyOptions(socket->options(), *socket,\n217:                                        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_LISTENING)) {\n218:       std::string message =\n219:           fmt::format(\"cannot set post-listen socket option on socket: {}\",\n220:                       socket->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress()->asString());\n221:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\n222:     }\n223:     return absl::OkStatus();\n224:   };\n225:   // On all platforms we should listen on the first socket.\n226:   auto iterator = sockets_.begin();\n227:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\n228:   ++iterator;\n229: #ifndef WIN32\n230:   // With this implementation on Windows we only accept\n231:   // connections on Worker 1 and then we use the `ExactConnectionBalancer`\n232:   // to balance these connections to all workers.\n233:   // TODO(davinci26): We should update the behavior when socket duplication\n234:   // does not cause accepts to hang in the OS.\n235:   for (; iterator != sockets_.end(); ++iterator) {\n236:     RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\n237:   }\n238: #endif\n239:   return absl::OkStatus();\n240: }\n241: \n242: namespace {\n243: std::string listenerStatsScope(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n244:   if (!config.stat_prefix().empty()) {\n245:     return config.stat_prefix();\n246:   }\n247:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\n248:     return absl::StrCat(\"envoy_internal_\", config.name());\n249:   }\n250:   auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\n251:   if (address_or_error.status().ok()) {\n252:     return address_or_error.value()->asString();\n253:   }\n254:   // Listener creation will fail shortly when the address is used.\n255:   return absl::StrCat(\"invalid_address_listener\");\n256: }\n257: } // namespace\n258: \n259: ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(\n260:     Envoy::Server::Instance& server, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n261:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager)\n262:     : Server::FactoryContextImplBase(\n263:           server, validation_visitor, server.stats().createScope(\"\"),\n264:           server.stats().createScope(fmt::format(\"listener.{}.\", listenerStatsScope(config))),\n265:           std::make_shared<ListenerInfoImpl>(config)),\n266:       drain_manager_(std::move(drain_manager)) {}\n267: \n268: Network::DrainDecision& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainDecision() { return *this; }\n269: Server::DrainManager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainManager() { return *drain_manager_; }\n270: Init::Manager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::initManager() { return server_.initManager(); }\n271: \n272: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n273: ListenerImpl::create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n274:                      const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\n275:                      const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\n276:                      uint64_t hash) {\n277:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\n278:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>(new ListenerImpl(\n279:       config, version_info, parent, name, added_via_api, workers_started, hash, creation_status));\n280:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\n281:   return ret;\n282: }\n283: \n284: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n285:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\n286:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\n287:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\n288:     : parent_(parent),\n289:       socket_type_(config.has_internal_listener()\n290:                        ? Network::Socket::Type::Stream\n291:                        : Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.address())),\n292:       bind_to_port_(shouldBindToPort(config)), mptcp_enabled_(config.enable_mptcp()),\n293:       hand_off_restored_destination_connections_(\n294:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, use_original_dst, false)),\n295:       per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_(\n296:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes, 1024 * 1024)),\n297:       listener_tag_(parent_.factory_->nextListenerTag()), name_(name),\n298:       added_via_api_(added_via_api), workers_started_(workers_started), hash_(hash),\n299:       tcp_backlog_size_(\n300:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, tcp_backlog_size, ENVOY_TCP_BACKLOG_SIZE)),\n301:       max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_(\n302:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event,\n303:                                           Network::DefaultMaxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent)),\n304:       validation_visitor_(\n305:           added_via_api_ ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor()\n306:                          : parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\n307:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\n308:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\n309:       listener_init_target_(fmt::format(\"Listener-init-target {}\", name),\n310:                             [this]() { dynamic_init_manager_->initialize(local_init_watcher_); }),\n311:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\n312:           fmt::format(\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\", name, hash))),\n313:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\n314:       listener_filters_timeout_(\n315:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\n316:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\n317:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\n318:           parent.server_, validation_visitor_, config, *this,\n319:           parent_.factory_->createDrainManager(config.drain_type()))),\n320:       reuse_port_(getReusePortOrDefault(parent_.server_, config, socket_type_)),\n321:       cx_limit_runtime_key_(\"envoy.resource_limits.listener.\" + config.name() +\n322:                             \".connection_limit\"),\n323:       open_connections_(std::make_shared<BasicResourceLimitImpl>(\n324:           std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(),\n325:           listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime(), cx_limit_runtime_key_)),\n326:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\", name),\n327:                           [this] {\n328:                             if (workers_started_) {\n329:                               parent_.onListenerWarmed(*this);\n330:                             } else {\n331:                               // Notify Server that this listener is\n332:                               // ready.\n333:                               listener_init_target_.ready();\n334:                             }\n335:                           }),\n336:       transport_factory_context_(\n337:           std::make_shared<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>(\n338:               parent_.server_.serverFactoryContext(), parent_.server_.sslContextManager(),\n339:               listenerScope(), parent_.server_.clusterManager(), validation_visitor_)),\n340:       quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\n341:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\n342:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\n343:   std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<\n344:       const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>\n345:       address_opts_list;\n346:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\n347:     addresses_.emplace_back(\n348:         std::make_shared<Network::Address::EnvoyInternalInstance>(config.name()));\n349:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\n350:   } else {\n351:     // All the addresses should be same socket type, so get the first address's socket type is\n352:     // enough.\n353:     auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\n354:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(address_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n355:     auto address = std::move(address_or_error.value());\n356:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.address()), creation_status);\n357:     addresses_.emplace_back(address);\n358:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\n359: \n360:     for (auto i = 0; i < config.additional_addresses_size(); i++) {\n361:       if (socket_type_ !=\n362:           Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.additional_addresses(i).address())) {\n363:         creation_status = absl::InvalidArgumentError(\n364:             fmt::format(\"listener {}: has different socket type. The listener only \"\n365:                         \"support same socket type for all the addresses.\",\n366:                         name_));\n367:         return;\n368:       }\n369:       auto addresses_or_error =\n370:           Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.additional_addresses(i).address());\n371:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(addresses_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n372:       auto additional_address = std::move(addresses_or_error.value());\n373:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(\n374:           checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.additional_addresses(i).address()),\n375:           creation_status);\n376:       addresses_.emplace_back(additional_address);\n377:       if (config.additional_addresses(i).has_socket_options()) {\n378:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(\n379:             std::ref(config.additional_addresses(i).socket_options().socket_options()));\n380:       } else {\n381:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\n382:       }\n383:     }\n384:   }\n385: \n386:   const absl::optional<std::string> runtime_val =\n387:       listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime().snapshot().get(\n388:           cx_limit_runtime_key_);\n389:   if (runtime_val && runtime_val->empty()) {\n390:     ENVOY_LOG(warn,\n391:               \"Listener connection limit runtime key {} is empty. There are currently no \"\n392:               \"limitations on the number of accepted connections for listener {}.\",\n393:               cx_limit_runtime_key_, config.name());\n394:   }\n395: \n396:   filter_chain_manager_ = std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\n397:       addresses_, listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager()),\n398: \n399:   buildAccessLog(config);\n400:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\n401: ",
