{
  "content": "#pragma once\n\n#include <memory>\n\n#include \"envoy/access_log/access_log.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/typed_metadata.h\"\n#include \"envoy/filter/config_provider_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/drain_decision.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/filter.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/listener.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/drain_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/filter_config.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/instance.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/listener_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/stats/scope.h\"\n\n#include \"source/common/common/basic_resource_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/common/logger.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/target_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/filter_chain_manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_info_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/quic/quic_stat_names.h\"\n#include \"source/server/factory_context_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/server/transport_socket_config_impl.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\n\n/**\n * All missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\n#define ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(COUNTER)                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(extension_config_missing)                                                                \\\n  COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n\n/**\n * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\nstruct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n  ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n};\n\nclass ListenerMessageUtil {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n   */\n  static bool socketOptionsEqual(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs are the same if ignoring filter_chains field.\n   */\n  static bool filterChainOnlyChange(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n};\n\nclass ListenerOrchestrator;\n\nclass ListenSocketFactoryImpl : public Network::ListenSocketFactory,\n                                protected Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\n  create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n         Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n         const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n         const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\n\n  // Network::ListenSocketFactory\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const override { return socket_type_; }\n  const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& localAddress() const override {\n    return local_address_;\n  }\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\n  Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\n    return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\n  }\n  void closeAllSockets() override {\n    for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\n      socket->close();\n    }\n  }\n  absl::Status doFinalPreWorkerInit() override;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                          Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n                          Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\n                          const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                          const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n                          ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n                          const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options,\n                          uint32_t num_sockets, absl::Status& creation_status);\n\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\n\n  absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\n  createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\n\n  ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\n  // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\n  // will be set to the binding port.\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n  const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\n  const std::string listener_name_;\n  const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n  ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\n  const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\n  // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\n  // 3 different cases:\n  // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\n  // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\n  // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\n  //\n  // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\n  // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\n  std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\n};\n\n// TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\n//                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\n\nclass ListenerImpl;\n\n/**\n * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\n * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\n */\nclass ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\n                                             public Network::DrainDecision {\npublic:\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                 ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                 Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n\n  // DrainDecision\n  bool drainClose() const override {\n    return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\n  }\n  Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\n};\n\n// TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\n// ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\n// listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\nclass PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\npublic:\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n                                ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n      std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n      ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n      : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n        listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n\n  // FactoryContext\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n  const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n  Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n  Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n  ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n};\n\n/**\n * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n */\nclass ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n                           public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n                           Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener.\n   * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n   * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n   * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n   * @param name supplies the listener name.\n   * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n   * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n   *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n   * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n   * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n         ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n         bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  ~ListenerImpl() override;\n\n  // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n  // update.\n  /**\n   * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n   * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n   */\n  absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                             bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  /**\n   * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n   */\n  bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n                                bool worker_started);\n\n  /**\n   * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n   * listener config.\n   */\n  void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n                       std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n\n  /**\n   * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n   */\n  bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n  bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n\n  const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n    return addresses_;\n  }\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n  const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n  void initialize();\n  DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n  }\n  absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n  void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n    ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n    return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n  }\n  const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n  bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n  static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n\n  // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n  bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n  bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n  bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n\n  // Network::ListenerConfig\n  Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n  Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n  bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n  bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n    return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  }\n  uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n    return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  }\n  std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n  uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n  const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n  Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n    return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n                                           : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n    return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n                                                : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n  connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n    auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n    ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n    return *balancer->second;\n  }\n  ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n  const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n  uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n  uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n    return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  }\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n  bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n  const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n    ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n  }\n\n  void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n    if (options == nullptr) {\n      options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n    }\n  }\n\n  absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n  void closeAllSockets();\n\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n\n  // Network::FilterChainFactory\n  bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n                                const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n  bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n  void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n                                    Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n  bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n\n  SystemTime last_updated_;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n               ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n               bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n  struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n    UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n        : config_(config) {}\n\n    // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n    listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n      auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n      ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n      return *iter->second;\n    }\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n    absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n  };\n\n  class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n  public:\n    InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n        : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n      return internal_listener_registry_;\n    }\n\n  private:\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n   * filter chain update is decided. Should be called only by newListenerWithFilterChain().\n   */\n  ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin, const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n               const std::string& version_info, ListenerOrchestrator& parent,\n               const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started, uint64_t hash,\n               absl::Status& creation_status);\n  // append_options) {\n    ensureSocketOptions(options);\n    Network::Socket::appendOptions(options, append_options);\n  }\n\n  ListenerOrchestrator& parent_;\n  std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr> addresses_;\n  const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr> socket_factories_;\n  const bool bind_to_port_;\n  const bool mptcp_enabled_;\n  const bool hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  const uint32_t per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  const uint64_t listener_tag_;\n  const max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor_;\n  const bool ignore_global_conn_limit_;\n  const bool bypass_overload_manager_;\n\n  // A target is added to Server's InitManager if workers_started_ is false.\n  Init::TargetImpl listener_init_target_;\n  // This init manager is populated with targets from the filter chain factories, namely\n  // RdsRouteConfigSubscription::init_target_, so the listener can wait for route configs.\n  std::unique_ptr<Init::Manager> dynamic_init_manager_;\n\n  Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList listener_filter_factories_;\n  std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb> udp_listener_filter_factories_;\n  Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList quic_listener_filter_factories_;\n  AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector access_logs_;\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config_;\n  const std::string version_info_;\n  // Using std::vector instead of hash map for supporting multiple zero port addresses.\n  std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr> listen_socket_options_list_;\n  const std::chrono::milliseconds listener_filters_timeout_;\n  const bool continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  std::shared_ptr<UdpListenerConfigImpl> udp_listener_config_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Network::InternalListenerConfig> internal_listener_config_;\n  // The key is the address string, the value is the address specific connection balancer.\n  // TODO (soulxu): Add hash support for address, then needn't a string address as key anymore.\n  absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::ConnectionBalancerSharedPtr> connection_balancers_;\n  std::shared_ptr<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl> listener_factory_context_;\n  std::unique_ptr<FilterChainManagerImpl> filter_chain_manager_;\n  const bool reuse_port_;\n\n  // Per-listener connection limits are only specified via runtime.\n  //\n  // TODO (tonya11en): Move this functionality into the overload manager.\n  const std::string cx_limit_runtime_key_;\n  std::shared_ptr<BasicResourceLimitImpl> open_connections_;\n\n  // This init watcher, if workers_started_ is false, notifies the \"parent\" listener manager when\n  // listener initialization is complete.\n  // Important: local_init_watcher_ must be the last field in the class to avoid unexpected\n  // watcher callback during the destroy of ListenerImpl.\n  Init::WatcherImpl local_init_watcher_;\n  std::shared_ptr<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>\n      transport_factory_context_;\n\n  Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names_;\n  MissingListenerConfigStats missing_listener_config_stats_;\n\n  // to access ListenerOrchestrator::factory_.\n  friend class ListenerFilterChainFactoryBuilder;\n};\n\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n",

  "content": "#pragma once\n\n#include <memory>\n\n#include \"envoy/access_log/access_log.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/typed_metadata.h\"\n#include \"envoy/filter/config_provider_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/drain_decision.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/filter.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/listener.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/drain_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/filter_config.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/instance.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/listener_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/stats/scope.h\"\n\n#include \"source/common/common/basic_resource_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/common/logger.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/target_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/filter_chain_manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_info_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/quic/quic_stat_names.h\"\n#include \"source/server/factory_context_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/server/transport_socket_config_impl.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\n\n/**\n * All missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\n#define ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(COUNTER)                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(extension_config_missing)                                                                \\\n  COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n\n/**\n * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\nstruct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n  ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n};\n\nclass ListenerMessageUtil {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n   */\n  static bool socketOptionsEqual(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs are the same if ignoring filter_chains field.\n   */\n  static bool filterChainOnlyChange(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n};\n\nclass ListenerOrchestrator;\n\nclass ListenSocketFactoryImpl : public Network::ListenSocketFactory,\n                                protected Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\n  create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n         Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n         const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n         const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\n\n  // Network::ListenSocketFactory\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const override { return socket_type_; }\n  const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& localAddress() const override {\n    return local_address_;\n  }\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\n  Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\n    return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\n  }\n  void closeAllSockets() override {\n    for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\n      socket->close();\n    }\n  }\n  absl::Status doFinalPreWorkerInit() override;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                          Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n                          Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\n                          const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                          const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n                          ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n                          const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options,\n                          uint32_t num_sockets, absl::Status& creation_status);\n\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\n\n  absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\n  createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\n\n  ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\n  // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\n  // will be set to the binding port.\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n  const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\n  const std::string listener_name_;\n  const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n  ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\n  const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\n  // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\n  // 3 different cases:\n  // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\n  // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\n  // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\n  //\n  // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\n  // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\n  std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\n};\n\n// TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\n//                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\n\nclass ListenerImpl;\n\n/**\n * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\n * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\n */\nclass ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\n                                             public Network::DrainDecision {\npublic:\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                 ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                 Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n\n  // DrainDecision\n  bool drainClose() const override {\n    return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\n  }\n  Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\n};\n\n// TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\n// ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\n// listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\nclass PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\npublic:\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n                                ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n      std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n      ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n      : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n        listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n\n  // FactoryContext\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n  const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n  Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n  Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n  ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n};\n\n/**\n * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n */\nclass ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n                           public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n                           Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener.\n   * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n   * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n   * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n   * @param name supplies the listener name.\n   * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n   * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n   *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n   * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n   * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n         ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n         bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  ~ListenerImpl() override;\n\n  // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n  // update.\n  /**\n   * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n   * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n   */\n  absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                             bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  /**\n   * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n   */\n  bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n                                bool worker_started);\n\n  /**\n   * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n   * listener config.\n   */\n  void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n                       std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n\n  /**\n   * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n   */\n  bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n  bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n\n  const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n    return addresses_;\n  }\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n  const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n  void initialize();\n  DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n  }\n  absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n  void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n    ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n    return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n  }\n  const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n  bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n  static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n\n  // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n  bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n  bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n  bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n\n  // Network::ListenerConfig\n  Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n  Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n  bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n  bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n    return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  }\n  uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n    return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  }\n  std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n  uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n  const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n  Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n    return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n                                           : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n    return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n                                                : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n  connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n    auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n    ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n    return *balancer->second;\n  }\n  ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n  const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n  uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n  uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n    return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  }\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n  bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n  const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n    ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n  }\n\n  void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n    if (options == nullptr) {\n      options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n    }\n  }\n\n  absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n  void closeAllSockets();\n\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n\n  // Network::FilterChainFactory\n  bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n                                const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n  bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n  void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n                                    Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n  bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n\n  SystemTime last_updated_;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n               ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n               bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n  struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n    UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n        : config_(config) {}\n\n    // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n    listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n      auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n      ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n      return *iter->second;\n    }\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n    absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n  };\n\n  class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n  public:\n    InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n        : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n      return internal_listener_registry_;\n    }\n\n  private:\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n   * filter chain update is decided. Should be called only by newListenerWithFilterChain().\n   */\n  ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin, const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n               const std::string& version_info, ListenerOrchestrator& parent,\n               const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started, uint64_t hash,\n               absl::Status& creation_status);\n  // buildUdpListenerFactory(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                       uint32_t concurrency);\n  void buildListenSocketOptions(const namely\n  // RdsRouteConfigSubscription::init_target_, so the listener can wait for route configs.\n  std::unique_ptr<Init::Manager> dynamic_init_manager_;\n\n  Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList listener_filter_factories_;\n  std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb> udp_listener_filter_factories_;\n  Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList quic_listener_filter_factories_;\n  AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector access_logs_;\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config_;\n  const std::string version_info_;\n  // Using std::vector instead of hash map for supporting multiple zero port addresses.\n  std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr> listen_socket_options_list_;\n  const std::chrono::milliseconds listener_filters_timeout_;\n  const bool continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  std::shared_ptr<UdpListenerConfigImpl> udp_listener_config_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Network::InternalListenerConfig> internal_listener_config_;\n  // The key is the address string, the value is the address specific connection balancer.\n  // TODO (soulxu): Add hash support for address, then needn't a string address as key anymore.\n  absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::ConnectionBalancerSharedPtr> connection_balancers_;\n  std::shared_ptr<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl> listener_factory_context_;\n  std::unique_ptr<FilterChainManagerImpl> filter_chain_manager_;\n  const bool reuse_port_;\n\n  // Per-listener connection limits are only specified via runtime.\n  //\n  // TODO (tonya11en): Move this functionality into the overload manager.\n  const std::string cx_limit_runtime_key_;\n  std::shared_ptr<BasicResourceLimitImpl> open_connections_;\n\n  // This init watcher, if workers_started_ is false, notifies the \"parent\" listener manager when\n  // listener initialization is complete.\n  // Important: local_init_watcher_ must be the last field in the class to avoid unexpected\n  // watcher callback during the destroy of ListenerImpl.\n  Init::WatcherImpl local_init_watcher_;\n  std::shared_ptr<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>\n      transport_factory_context_;\n\n  Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names_;\n  MissingListenerConfigStats missing_listener_config_stats_;\n\n  // to access ListenerOrchestrator::factory_.\n  friend class ListenerFilterChainFactoryBuilder;\n};\n\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n",

25. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "\n# Use Sourcegraph to fetch the file in raw format and perform replacements\n# Let's try using a different approach - we'll create the file by getting it from Sourcegraph\n\n# First, let me fetch the file size to understand how to handle it\n# For now, let me fetch it directly using the Sourcegraph API in a simpler way\n\n# Let's create a script that will read chunks and combine them\ncat > /tmp/fetch_and_replace.py << 'ENDPYTHON'\nimport sys\nimport json\nimport subprocess\n\n# Since we can't easily fetch large files through the API in a single call,\n# let's use a bash script to handle this\n\n# For listener_impl.cc, we know it has these replacements needed:\n# ListenerManagerImpl& -> ListenerOrchestrator&\n\n# Let's create a simpler approach - read from the previous saved JSON\nwith open('/logs/agent/sessions/projects/-workspace/96709520-9821-446a-95bb-a77a7032fa80/tool-results/toolu_01PmWWFXc3JcQ59Lip9d5wun.txt', 'r') as f:\n    try:\n        data = json.load(f)\n        content = data.get('content', '')\n        if content:\n            print(f\"ERROR: This is listener_manager_impl.cc, not listener_impl.cc\")\n            print(f\"Total chars: {len(content)}\")\n            # Find how many lines\n            lines = content.split('\\n')\n            print(f\"Total lines: {len(lines)}\")\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n        print(f\"ERROR: {e}\")\n\nENDPYTHON\n\npython3 /tmp/fetch_and_replace.py\n"
}

Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\\n103:     }\\n104:   } else {\\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\\n111:       }\\n112:     } else {\\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\\n115:     }\\n116:   }\\n117: \\n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n121: \\n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() && local_address_->ip()->port() == 0) {\\n123:     local_address_ = sockets_[0]->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress();\\n124:   }\\n125:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Set listener {} socket factory local address to {}\\\", listener_name,\\n126:             local_address_->asString());\\n127: \\n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\\n132:     } else {\\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n136:     }\\n137:   }\\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\\n139: }\\n140: \\n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\\n155:     //\\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\\n162:   }\\n163: }\\n164: \\n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\\n174: \\n175:   // Binding is done by now.\\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\\\", listener_name_,\\n177:             local_address_->asString());\\n178:   if (socket != nullptr && options_ != nullptr) {\\n179:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\\n180:         options_, *socket, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_BOUND);\\n181:     const std::string message =\\n182:         fmt::format(\\\"{}: Setting socket options {}\\\", listener_name_, ok ? \\\"succeeded\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n183:     if (!ok) {\\n184:       ENVOY_LOG(warn, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n185:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n186:     } else {\\n187:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n188:     }\\n189: \\n190:     // Add the options to the socket_ so that STATE_LISTENING options can be\\n191:     // set after listen() is called and immediately before the workers start running.\\n192:     socket->addOptions(options_);\\n193:   }\\n194:   return socket;\\n195: }\\n196: \\n197: Network::SocketSharedPtr ListenSocketFactoryImpl::getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) {\\n198:   // Per the TODO above, sockets at this point can never be null. That only happens in the\\n199:   // config validation path.\\n200:   ASSERT(worker_index < sockets_.size() && sockets_[worker_index] != nullptr);\\n201:   return sockets_[worker_index];\\n202: }\\n203: \\n204: absl::Status ListenSocketFactoryImpl::doFinalPreWorkerInit() {\\n205:   if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind ||\\n206:       socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n207:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n208:   }\\n209: \\n210:   ASSERT(!sockets_.empty());\\n211:   auto listen_and_apply_options = [](Envoy::Network::SocketSharedPtr socket, int tcp_backlog_size) {\\n212:     const auto rc = socket->ioHandle().listen(tcp_backlog_size);\\n213:     if (rc.return_value_ != 0) {\\n214:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\\"cannot listen() errno={}\\\", rc.errno_));\\n215:     }\\n216:     if (!Network::Socket::applyOptions(socket->options(), *socket,\\n217:                                        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_LISTENING)) {\\n218:       std::string message =\\n219:           fmt::format(\\\"cannot set post-listen socket option on socket: {}\\\",\\n220:                       socket->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress()->asString());\\n221:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n222:     }\\n223:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n224:   };\\n225:   // On all platforms we should listen on the first socket.\\n226:   auto iterator = sockets_.begin();\\n227:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n228:   ++iterator;\\n229: #ifndef WIN32\\n230:   // With this implementation on Windows we only accept\\n231:   // connections on Worker 1 and then we use the `ExactConnectionBalancer`\\n232:   // to balance these connections to all workers.\\n233:   // TODO(davinci26): We should update the behavior when socket duplication\\n234:   // does not cause accepts to hang in the OS.\\n235:   for (; iterator != sockets_.end(); ++iterator) {\\n236:     RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n237:   }\\n238: #endif\\n239:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n240: }\\n241: \\n242: namespace {\\n243: std::string listenerStatsScope(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n244:   if (!config.stat_prefix().empty()) {\\n245:     return config.stat_prefix();\\n246:   }\\n247:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n248:     return absl::StrCat(\\\"envoy_internal_\\\", config.name());\\n249:   }\\n250:   auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n251:   if (address_or_error.status().ok()) {\\n252:     return address_or_error.value()->asString();\\n253:   }\\n254:   // Listener creation will fail shortly when the address is used.\\n255:   return absl::StrCat(\\\"invalid_address_listener\\\");\\n256: }\\n257: } // namespace\\n258: \\n259: ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(\\n260:     Envoy::Server::Instance& server, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\\n261:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager)\\n262:     : Server::FactoryContextImplBase(\\n263:           server, validation_visitor, server.stats().createScope(\\\"\\\"),\\n264:           server.stats().createScope(fmt::format(\\\"listener.{}.\\\", listenerStatsScope(config))),\\n265:           std::make_shared<ListenerInfoImpl>(config)),\\n266:       drain_manager_(std::move(drain_manager)) {}\\n267: \\n268: Network::DrainDecision& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainDecision() { return *this; }\\n269: Server::DrainManager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainManager() { return *drain_manager_; }\\n270: Init::Manager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::initManager() { return server_.initManager(); }\\n271: \\n272: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\\n273: ListenerImpl::create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n274:                      const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n275:                      const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n276:                      uint64_t hash) {\\n277:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\\n278:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>(new ListenerImpl(\\n279:       config, version_info, parent, name, added_via_api, workers_started, hash, creation_status));\\n280:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\\n281:   return ret;\\n282: }\\n283: \\n284: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n285:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n286:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n287:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n288:     : parent_(parent),\\n289:       socket_type_(config.has_internal_listener()\\n290:                        ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\\n307:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\\n308:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\\n309:       listener_init_target_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-init-target {}\\\", name),\\n310:                             [this]() { dynamic_init_manager_->initialize(local_init_watcher_); }),\\n311:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\\n312:           fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\\\", name, hash))),\\n313:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\\n314:       listener_filters_timeout_(\\n315:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\\n316:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\\n317:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\\n318:           parent.server_, validation_visitor_, config, *this,\\n319:           parent_.factory_->createDrainManager(config.drain_type()))),\\n320:       reuse_port_(getReusePortOrDefault(parent_.server_, config, socket_type_)),\\n321:       cx_limit_runtime_key_(\\\"envoy.resource_limits.listener.\\\" + config.name() +\\n322:                             \\\".connection_limit\\\"),\\n323:       open_connections_(std::make_shared<BasicResourceLimitImpl>(\\n324:           std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(),\\n325:           listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime(), cx_limit_runtime_key_)),\\n326:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\\\", name),\\n327:                           [this] {\\n328:                             if (workers_started_) {\\n329:                               parent_.onListenerWarmed(*this);\\n330:                             } else {\\n331:                               // Notify Server that this listener is\\n332:                               // ready.\\n333:                               listener_init_target_.ready();\\n334:                             }\\n335:                           }),\\n336:       transport_factory_context_(\\n337:           std::make_shared<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>(\\n338:               parent_.server_.serverFactoryContext(), parent_.server_.sslContextManager(),\\n339:               listenerScope(), parent_.server_.clusterManager(), validation_visitor_)),\\n340:       quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\\n341:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\\n342:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\\n343:   std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<\\n344:       const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>\\n345:       address_opts_list;\\n346:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n347:     addresses_.emplace_back(\\n348:         std::make_shared<Network::Address::EnvoyInternalInstance>(config.name()));\\n349:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n350:   } else {\\n351:     // All the addresses should be same socket type, so get the first address's socket type is\\n352:     // enough.\\n353:     auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n354:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(address_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n355:     auto address = std::move(address_or_error.value());\\n356:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.address()), creation_status);\\n357:     addresses_.emplace_back(address);\\n358:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n359: \\n360:     for (auto i = 0; i < config.additional_addresses_size(); i++) {\\n361:       if (socket_type_ !=\\n362:           Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.additional_addresses(i).address())) {\\n363:         creation_status = absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n364:             fmt::format(\\\"listener {}: has different socket type. The listener only \\\"\\n365:                         \\\"support same socket type for all the addresses.\\\",\\n366:                         name_));\\n367:         return;\\n368:       }\\n369:       auto addresses_or_error =\\n370:           Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.additional_addresses(i).address());\\n371:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(addresses_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n372:       auto additional_address = std::move(addresses_or_error.value());\\n373:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(\\n374:           checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.additional_addresses(i).address()),\\n375:           creation_status);\\n376:       addresses_.emplace_back(additional_address);\\n377:       if (config.additional_addresses(i).has_socket_options()) {\\n378:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(\\n379:             std::ref(config.additional_addresses(i).socket_options().socket_options()));\\n380:       } else {\\n381:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n382:       }\\n383:     }\\n384:   }\\n385: \\n386:   const absl::optional<std::string> runtime_val =\\n387:       listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime().snapshot().get(\\n388:           cx_limit_runtime_key_);\\n389:   if (runtime_val && runtime_val->empty()) {\\n390:     ENVOY_LOG(warn,\\n391:               \\\"Listener connection limit runtime key {} is empty. There are currently no \\\"\\n392:               \\\"limitations on the number of accepted connections for listener {}.\\\",\\n393:               cx_limit_runtime_key_, config.name());\\n394:   }\\n395: \\n396:   filter_chain_manager_ = std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n397:       addresses_, listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager()),\\n398: \\n399:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n400:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n401: \\n402:   // buildUdpListenerFactory() must come before buildListenSocketOptions() because the UDP\\n403:   // listener factory can provide additional options.\\n404:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildUdpListenerFactory(config, parent_.server_.options().concurrency()),\\n405:                            creation_status);\\n406:   buildListenSocketOptions(config, address_opts_list);\\n407:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(createListenerFilterFactories(config), creation_status);\\n408:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n409:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n410:   if (socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n411:     buildSocketOptions(config);\\n412:     buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(config);\\n413:     buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(config);\\n414:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n415:   }\\n416:   if (!workers_started_) {\\n417:     // Initialize dynamic_init_manager_ from Server's init manager if it's not initialized.\\n418:     // NOTE: listener_init_target_ should be added to parent's initManager at the end of the\\n419:     // listener constructor so that this listener's children entities could register their targets\\n420:     // with their parent's initManager.\\n421:     parent_.server_.initManager().add(listener_init_target_);\\n422:   }\\n423: }\\n424: \\n425: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin,\\n426:                            const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n427:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n428:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n429:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n430:     : parent_(parent), addresses_(origin.addresses_), socket_type_(origin.socket_type_),\\n431:       bind_to_port_(shouldBindToPort(config)), mptcp_enabled_(config.enable_mptcp()),\\n432:       hand_off_restored_destination_connections_(\\n433:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, use_original_dst, false)),\\n434:       per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_(\\n435:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes, 1024 * 1024)),\\n436:       listener_tag_(origin.listener_tag_), name_(name), added_via_api_(added_via_api),\\n437:       workers_started_(workers_started), hash_(hash),\\n438:       tcp_backlog_size_(\\n439:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, tcp_backlog_size, ENVOY_TCP_BACKLOG_SIZE)),\\n440:       max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_(\\n441:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event,\\n442:                                           Network::DefaultMaxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent)),\\n443:       validation_visitor_(\\n444:           added_via_api_ ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor()\\n445:                          : parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\\n446:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\\n447:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\\n448:       // listener_init_target_ is not used during in place update because we expect server started.\\n449:       listener_init_target_(\\\"\\\", nullptr),\\n450:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\\n451:           fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\\\", name, hash))),\\n452:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\\n453:       listen_socket_options_list_(origin.listen_socket_options_list_),\\n454:       listener_filters_timeout_(\\n455:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\\n456:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\\n457:       udp_listener_config_(origin.udp_listener_config_),\\n458:       connection_balancers_(origin.connection_balancers_),\\n459:       // Reuse the listener_factory_context_base_ from the origin listener because the filter chain\\n460:       // only updates will not change the listener_factory_context_base_.\\n461:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\\n462:           origin.listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_, *this)),\\n463:       filter_chain_manager_(std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n464:           addresses_, origin.listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager(),\\n465:           *origin.filter_chain_manager_)),\\n466:       reuse_port_(origin.reuse_port_),\\n467:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\\\", name),\\n468:                           [this] {\\n469:                             ASSERT(workers_started_);\\n470:                             parent_.inPlaceFilterChainUpdate(*this);\\n471:                           }),\\n472:       transport_factory_context_(origin.transport_factory_context_),\\n473:       quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\\n474:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\\n475:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\\n476:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n477:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n478:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(createListenerFilterFactories(config), creation_status);\\n479:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n480:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n481:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n482:   if (socket_type_ == Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n483:     // Apply the options below only for TCP.\\n484:     buildSocketOptions(config);\\n485:     buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(config);\\n486:     buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(config);\\n487:     open_connections_ = origin.open_connections_;\\n488:   }\\n489: }\\n490: \\n491: absl::Status\\n492: ListenerImpl::checkIpv4CompatAddress(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address,\\n493:                                      const envoy::config::core::v3::Address& proto_address) {\\n494:   if ((address->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip &&\\n495:        proto_address.socket_address().ipv4_compat()) &&\\n496:       (address->ip()->version() != Network::Address::IpVersion::v6 ||\\n497:        (!address->ip()->isAnyAddress() &&\\n498:         address->ip()->ipv6()->v4CompatibleAddress() == nullptr))) {\\n499:     return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\n500:         \\\"Only IPv6 address '::' or valid IPv4-mapped IPv6 address can set ipv4_compat: {}\\\",\\n501:         address->asStringView()));\\n502:   }\\n503:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n504: }\\n505: \\n506: absl::Status ListenerImpl::validateConfig() {\\n507:   if (mptcp_enabled_) {\\n508:     if (socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n509:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n510:           fmt::format(\\\"listener {}: enable_mptcp can only be used with TCP listeners\\\", name_));\\n511:     }\\n512:     for (auto& address : addresses_) {\\n513:       if (address->type() != Network::Address::Type::Ip) {\\n514:         return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n515:             fmt::format(\\\"listener {}: enable_mptcp can only be used with IP addresses\\\", name_));\\n516:       }\\n517:     }\\n518:     if (!Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsMptcp()) {\\n519:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\n520:           \\\"listener {}: enable_mptcp is set but MPTCP is not supported by the operating system\\\",\\n521:           name_));\\n522:     }\\n523:   }\\n524:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n525: }\\n526: \\n527: void ListenerImpl::buildAccessLog(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n528:   for (const auto& access_log : config.access_log()) {\\n529:     AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtr current_access_log =\\n530:         AccessLog::AccessLogFactory::fromProto(access_log, *listener_factory_context_);\\n531:     access_logs_.push_back(current_access_log);\\n532:   }\\n533: }\\n534: \\n535: absl::Status\\n536: ListenerImpl::buildInternalListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n537:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n538:     if (config.has_address() || !config.additional_addresses().empty()) {\\n539:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n540:           fmt::format(\\\"error adding listener '{}': address should not be used \\\"\\n541:                       \\\"when an internal listener config is provided\\\",\\n542:                       name_));\\n543:     }\\n544:     if ((config.has_connection_balance_config() &&\\n545:          config.connection_balance_config().has_exact_balance()) ||\\n546:         config.enable_mptcp() ||\\n547:         config.has_enable_reuse_port() // internal listener doesn't use physical l4 port.\\n548:         || (config.has_freebind() && config.freebind().value()) || config.has_tcp_backlog_size() ||\\n549:         config.has_tcp_fast_open_queue_length() ||\\n550:         (config.has_transparent() && config.transparent().value())) {\\n551:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\n552:           \\\"error adding listener named '{}': has unsupported tcp listener feature\\\", name_));\\n553:     }\\n554:     if (!config.socket_options().empty()) {\\n555:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n556:           fmt::format(\\\"error adding listener named '{}': does not support socket option\\\", name_));\\n557:     }\\n558:     std::shared_ptr<Network::InternalListenerRegistry> internal_listener_registry =\\n559:         parent_.server_.singletonManager().getTyped<Network::InternalListenerRegistry>(\\n560:             \\\"internal_listener_registry_singleton\\\");\\n561:     if (internal_listener_registry == nullptr) {\\n562:       // The internal listener registry may be uninitialized when in Validate mode.\\n563:       // Hence we check the configuration directly to ensure the bootstrap extension\\n564:       // InternalListener is present.\\n565:       if (absl::c_none_of(\\n566:               listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().bootstrap().bootstrap_extensions(),\\n567:               [=](const auto& extension) {\\n568:                 return extension.typed_config().type_url() ==\\n569:                        \\\"type.googleapis.com/\\\"\\n570:                        \\\"envoy.extensions.bootstrap.internal_listener.v3.InternalListener\\\";\\n571:               })) {\\n572:         return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\n573:             \\\"error adding listener named '{}': InternalListener bootstrap extension is mandatory\\\",\\n574:             name_));\\n575:       }\\n576:       internal_listener_config_ = nullptr;\\n577:     } else {\\n578:       internal_listener_config_ =\\n579:           std::make_unique<InternalListenerConfigImpl>(*internal_listener_registry);\\n580:     }\\n581:   } else if (config.address().has_envoy_internal_address() ||\\n582:              std::any_of(config.additional_addresses().begin(), config.additional_addresses().end(),\\n583:                          [](const envoy::config::listener::v3::AdditionalAddress& proto_address) {\\n584:                            return proto_address.address().has_envoy_internal_address();\\n585:                          })) {\\n586:     return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n587:         fmt::format(\\\"error adding listener named '{}': use internal_listener \\\"\\n588:                     \\\"field instead of address for internal listeners\\\",\\n589:                     name_));\\n590:   }\\n591:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n592: }\\n593: \\n594: bool ListenerImpl::buildUdpListenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address,\\n595:                                                 uint32_t concurrency) {\\n596:   if (socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n597:     return false;\\n598:   }\\n599:   auto iter = udp_listener_config_->listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\\n600:   if (iter != udp_listener_config_->listener_worker_routers_.end()) {\\n601:     return false;\\n602:   }\\n603:   udp_listener_config_->listener_worker_routers_.emplace(\\n604:       address.asString(), std::make_unique<Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterImpl>(concurrency));\\n605:   return true;\\n606: }\\n607: \\n608: absl::Status\\n609: ListenerImpl::buildUdpListenerFactory(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n610:                                       uint32_t concurrency) {\\n611:   if (socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n612:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n613:   }\\n614:   if (!reuse_port_ && concurrency > 1) {\\n615:     return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n616:         \\\"Listening on UDP when concurrency is > 1 without the SO_REUSEPORT \\\"\\n617:         \\\"socket option results in \\\"\\n618:         \\\"unstable packet proxying. Configure the reuse_port listener option or \\\"\\n619:         \\\"set concurrency = 1.\\\");\\n620:   }\\n621: \\n622:   udp_listener_config_ = std::make_shared<UdpListenerConfigImpl>(config.udp_listener_config());\\n623:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr udp_packet_packet_writer_config;\\n624:   if (config.udp_listener_config().has_udp_packet_packet_writer_config()) {\\n625:     auto* factory_factory = Config::Utility::getFactory<Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryFactory>(\\n626:         config.udp_listener_config().udp_packet_packet_writer_config());\\n627:     udp_listener_config_->writer_factory_ = factory_factory->createUdpPacketWriterFactory(\\n628:         config.udp_listener_config().udp_packet_packet_writer_config());\\n629:   }\\n630:   if (config.udp_listener_config().has_quic_options()) {\\n631: #ifdef ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC\\n632:     if (config.has_connection_balance_config()) {\\n633:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n634:           \\\"connection_balance_config is configured for QUIC listener which \\\"\\n635:           \\\"doesn't work with connection balancer.\\\");\\n636:     }\\n637:     udp_listener_config_->listener_factory_ = std::make_unique<Quic::ActiveQuicListenerFactory>(\\n638:         config.udp_listener_config().quic_options(), concurrency, quic_stat_names_,\\n639:         validation_visitor_, *listener_factory_context_);\\n640: #if UDP_GSO_BATCH_WRITER_COMPILETIME_SUPPORT\\n641:     // TODO(mattklein123): We should be able to use GSO without QUICHE/QUIC. Right now this causes\\n642:     // non-QUIC integration tests to fail, which I haven't investigated yet. Additionally, from\\n643:     // looking at the GSO code there are substantial copying inefficiency so I don't think it's\\n644:     // wise to enable to globally for now. I will circle back and fix both of the above with\\n645:     // a non-QUICHE GSO implementation.\\n646:     if (udp_listener_config_->writer_factory_ == nullptr &&\\n647:         Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGso()) {\\n648:       udp_listener_config_->writer_factory_ = std::make_unique<Quic::UdpGsoBatchWriterFactory>();\\n649:     }\\n650: #endif\\n651: #else\\n652:     return absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\\"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\\\");\\n653: #endif\\n654:   } else {\\n655:     udp_listener_config_->listener_factory_ =\\n656:         std::make_unique<Server::ActiveRawUdpListenerFactory>(concurrency);\\n657:   }\\n658:   if (udp_listener_config_->writer_factory_ == nullptr) {\\n659:     udp_listener_config_->writer_factory_ = std::make_unique<Network::UdpDefaultWriterFactory>();\\n660:   }\\n661:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n662: }\\n663: \\n664: void ListenerImpl::buildListenSocketOptions(\\n665:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n666:     std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<\\n667:         const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>&\\n668:         address_opts_list) {\\n669:   listen_socket_options_list_.insert(listen_socket_options_list_.begin(), addresses_.size(),\\n670:                                      nullptr);\\n671:   for (std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<\\n672:            const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>&>>::size_type i =\\n673:            0;\\n674:        i < address_opts_list.size(); i++) {\\n675:     // The process-wide `signal()` handling may fail to handle SIGPIPE if overridden\\n676:     // in the process (i.e., on a mobile client). Some OSes support handling it at the socket layer:\\n677:     if (ENVOY_SOCKET_SO_NOSIGPIPE.hasValue()) {\\n678:       addListenSocketOptions(listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n679:                              Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildSocketNoSigpipeOptions());\\n680:     }\\n681:     if (PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, transparent, false)) {\\n682:       addListenSocketOptions(listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n683:                              Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpTransparentOptions());\\n684:     }\\n685:     if (PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, freebind, false)) {\\n686:       addListenSocketOptions(listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n687:                              Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpFreebindOptions());\\n688:     }\\n689:     if (reuse_port_) {\\n690:       addListenSocketOptions(listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n691:                              Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildReusePortOptions());\\n692:     }\\n693:     if (!config.socket_options().empty()) {\\n694:       addListenSocketOptions(\\n695:           listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n696:           Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildLiteralOptions(address_opts_list[i]));\\n697:     }\\n698:     if (socket_type_ == Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n699:       // Needed for recvmsg to return destination address in IP header.\\n700:       addListenSocketOptions(listen_socket_options_list_[i],\\n701: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.cc%3FL1-700\"}",
